name: 2017.09.03 GIHP
description: One solo lap around the old olympic course in Conyers, GA.  Oh what a nice job the GoPro Karma stabilizer setup does. Also, those GoPro stats overlays are super neat looking but the speed one is... not accurate.  That also took forever to GoPro -> Quik Desktop -> Final Cut. Probably not going to do that again. "Linear" for first half, "Super Wide" for second. I'll stick to super wide in the future too I believe.

name: 2017.08.21 Eclipse
description: The Atlanta skyline goes dark during the 2017 solar eclipse. Shot from the 34th floor of Atlantic Plaza by Lenox Mall at 15s intervals.

Join us! Every Tuesday Night at 8:30pm at The Flying Biscuit on McLendon in Atlanta, GA

name: Dirty Mustache Ride
description:
Night mountain biking on 2013.04.09.  GoPro does alright in low light!

Join us! Every Tuesday Night at 8:30pm at The Flying Biscuit on McLendon in Atlanta, GA

Music: Skrillex: Summit

name: Allatoona Creek
description:
Bob and I take Bill P for his first mountain bike ride ever.  http://app.strava.com/activities/47736060

This was also my first try at using a GoPro Hero 3 Black. It does a pretty great job, and with a little more tinkering with settings and mounting options, I don't think I'll be pining for some different kind of camera like I was with my previous helmetcam. The only 'problem' is that the battery only lasted for about an hour of footage with wifi turned off, and iMovie is pretty rough with 1440px video.

Music: In Flames: Where The Dead Ships Dwell

name: Amicalolaish
description:
Brian Tester, Bob Donlan, Charles Brian Quinn and I rode around near Amicalola falls park in North Georgia. Due to some bushwhacking to connect together two old Forest Service roads we didn't end up making it to the falls, but had a good time.  This was my Canon EOS-M's first trip into the woods, and I don't think it will be it's last.

Music:  'Kid' by Still Life Still

name: GACX Macon A Race
description:
Canon EOS M does an alright job. Make sure you're watching the HD version!

Music: Woods Of Ypres - Lightning & Snow

name: Gregg makes espresso
description:
This is the first video shot on my Canon EOS M.  Very low light, only artificial light is backlit, with some natural light from skylights far away.  All auto and no 'out-of-the-box' settings customized. Video uploaded from the camera with no processing.

The audio buzzing is weird, maybe my finger was on the mic? maybe that is some effect of the focus motor? Hopefully not something I need to return this thing for.

name: View from Mars Ridge, Ketchum, ID
source_file_name: 2012.09.01 View from Mars Ridge, Ketchum, ID.mp4

name: Built some new trail at Nico's house today
source_file_name: 2012.02.12 Built some new trail at Nico's house today.mp4

name: Blankets Creek
description: Mike's first time on a real mountain bike trail,  and my/cbq/mike's first time on a downhill run (on hardtails too).  No crazy jumps, but some air!  Bob's a seasoned pro.

name: Stanley Gap
description: Bob and I ride Stanley Gap, Flat Creek, and Green Mountain. The iPhone 4S shoots alright video!  Photos: http://ckdake.com/gallery/2011/stanleygapagain/

name: Madison Night
description: Madison Night at the Dick Lane Velodrome in East Point, GA.  2011.05.11

name: FATS
description:
Jason, Bob, Jim and I of http://fastermustache.org/race headed to Clarks Hill, SC to ride at FATS: an IMBA Epic trail system with over 40 miles of riding to be done. We rode it all, and then rode some of it again!

It's hunting season so theres some goofy orangeness going on.

name: FM:Chicopee
description:
Part of the http://fastermustache.org/race crew headed up to Chicopee for some recreational mountain biking.  The camera rotated between Jason, Ed, and X. I rode as well but felt pretty bad and let them do the taping!

Heres the route (minus 2.7 miles I didn't record at the beginning): http://connect.garmin.com/activity/40944018

Music: Metric - Gold Guns Girls

name: Blankets Creek at Night
description:
FM:Race team (http://fastermustache.org/race)  members Bob, Jim, Jason, Adrian, and I ride for ~2 hours on Friday night at Blankets Creek in Woodstock, GA.  Jason's light died, Bob's pants died, and good times were had.

Music: Silversun Pickups - Substitution

Filmed with a VIO POV1.5 lit by a NiteRider SlickRock 900 and a NiteRider MiNewt x.2 Dual. Next time I'll aim the camera a little higher, but this is a definite improvement from  just the NiteRider TrailRat 10W: http://vimeo.com/3394871

name: 2010 ING Atlanta Wheelchair Half Marathon
description:
Wheelchair athletes racing in the 2010 ING Half Marathon in Atlanta. Steep hills, sharp turns, and Atlanta's rough streets.

Music: "My Delirium" by Ladyhawke

name: The Full Douche
description:
As my friend Jim named this,  it's a video capture of The Full Douche Maneuver.  

http://www.jimhodgson.com/2010/03/18/the-douche-maneuver/

Downtown Atlanta, 5:40am, me turning left off of a closed street into the left lane of a one-way street and the car turning right onto this one-way street slides over and cuts me off, almost is if they didn't even see me.

Pay attention out there!

name: Tribble Mill
description: Bob, Jason, Seth, and I riding for 2.5 hours at Tribble Mill Park, GA.   Not nearly enough footage to show how good of a time we had.

name: Clinton Nature Park
description:
Jim, Bob, and I spent 2.5 hours riding around the Clinton Nature Park in Douglasville, GA.  

Not the best trails, but a 30 min drive from downtown Atlanta and enough variety to keep it interesting.

Music:
Party of Helicopters - Brutal Enigma
Funeral for a Friend - Alvarez

name: FM.24.09 Lap 1
description: Lap 1 of FM.24.09 as recorded by Aaron Chamberlain.  http://24.fastermustache.org/ to see what all this is about.

name: Dirty Mustache at the skate park
description: Nico, Bob, X, Alex, and I got in 21 miles on mountain bikes in-town tonight. Some of it was goofing around like this, parts were on roads, and other parts were tearing through the darkness over railroad tracks, across creeks, and down powerline cuts.

name: Nico tearing it up
description: Eric shows up how it's done, in the dark, on a mountain bike.

name: DLV 2009 Pro Racing Series - The Wheelrace
description: As and Bs, both local track stars and people from around the country, come together to compete in the second Pro Race Series weekend of 2009 at the Dick Lane Velodrome.  Footage from several of the A and B races spliced together.

name: DLV 2009 Pro Racing Series - The Wheelrace - Bicycle Little League
description: The kids in the Dick Lane Velodrome's Bicycle Little League program battle it out on the track!

name: DLV 2009 Pro Racing Series - Mens A 20 Lap Scratch
description: Greggory Rothmeier cat's up to ride with the pros and shoot some video.  Colleen Hayduck, US Juniors National champion, get's called up as well.  Dave Worth and Oscar Clarke take 1st and 2nd place.  (This was Gregg's first time riding with a camera strapped to him, and he did an awesome job)

name: DLV 2009 Pro Racing Series - The Keirin
description: Video from the first few rounds of The Kerin at Dick Lane Velodrome's 2009 Pro Racing Series.  Probably need to use a few more cameras next time, as the view from the back of the motorcycle is pretty consistent.

name: Tsali - SERC#3 course FM:Race pre-ride
description: The Faster Mustache race team headed up to Tsali on Saturday to get in a pre-ride of the SERC#3 course. The course ended up being part of the access road, most of the right loop then taking the left loop instead of the road back, and finally doing the south-east part of the right loop to the parking lot.

name: Tsali - Thompson Loop
description: Adrian and I did a lap on Thompson Loop at Tsali in North Carolina after the Faster Mustache race team preride of the course for 2009 SERC#3.  Note that doing 28 miles of riding the day before a race is not recommended.

name: Conyers - The Hard Side
description: Roger and I run through the "hard side" of the Georgia International Horse Park mountain bike trails in Conyers, GA.

name: Conyers - The Easy Side
description: Roger and I run through the "easy side" of the Georgia International Horse Park mountain bike trails in Conyers, GA.

name: 09 Beginners Class at the DLV
description:
2009.03.29 beginner's class at the Dick Lane Velodrome in East Point, GA.  Tried out a few new camera mounts and learned a few things including: mount the camera on the infield side of the frame, and watch out for loose velcro, and iMovie's image stabilization is no good for this sort of footage.  This is from a little over 2 hours of footage, and my legs are definitely a little sore!

This one is a little long, but hopefully does a good job showing how much fun a first day on the track can be, and hopefully there's a little bit of video of everyone that participated.
source_file_name: 2016.09.22 Moab Day 2 - The Whole Enchilada (no music).mov

name: The Return Of The Son (2006)
description: Another imovifest movie, this one for "Campus Movie Fest" 2006. I'm in this one and took pictures which you can see at http://ckdake.com/gallery/2006/jan-imf/ .

name: Study Hard - Afflicted (2003)
description: 2003 Video that my Freshman hall at Georgia Tech put together for imoviefest (now called campus movie fest) that won us $750.

name: Track Season 2009
description: http://fastermustache.org/race will be fielding a team in this year's track season at http://dicklanevelodrome.com/.  We'll have people there every Tuesday and Wednesday nights for the training races, and will be out in full force at each of the Festivals of Speed. See you there!

name: 2009 Snake Creek Gap Time Trial #3
description: First try using the pov1.5 during the day on a mountain bike. Worked out pretty well, and I think this gives a pretty good feel for what much of the race was like. More about the race at http://www.nwgasorba.org/the_snake.html and more about my team at http://fastermustache.org/race

name: Georgia Rides to the Capitol 2009
description:
Geez. Road biking is even more boring to watch that night mountain biking and riding a fixed gear in falling snow.  Whatever!  This documents the 2009 Georgia Rides to the Capitol event (http://www.georgiaridestothecapitol.org/) and gives a pretty good idea of what was going on, but doesn't quite show how cold it was. 21F at the start and 36F at the finish. 

Hopefully next upload will be a short, awesome, mountain biking video.

name: Snow Ride in Atlanta
description: Its "thundersnowing" in Atlanta according to the weather forecast.  I figured this may be my only chance in a while to try out the Vio POV.1.5 in the snow, so here goes.

name: Conyers - 2009.02.26
description:
Roger, Aaron, Austin, and I do some laps at Conyers at night with my new camera.  The video turned out alright, and I learned a few things about what looks alright and what doesn't at night, but during the day video should be awesome. 

May not be worth watching the whole thing, but maybe?
